headline: US Stock Market Today S&P 500 Futures Climb On Cooler Wage And Services Data
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Monday, Apr, 6 2026 US stock futures are pointing higher this morning, with key index contracts up around 0.7% to 1.1% as investors weigh a mix of strong jobs data and mixed growth signals. The March nonfarm payrolls report showed 178,000 new jobs and unemployment at 4.3%, a sign the job market is still adding work even as wage growth cools to roughly 3.5% to 3.7% a year. This eases pressure on pay packets and on interest rates. At the same time,...
